name: ablation-planner
title: Ablation Study Planner
description: Use this skill to design reviewer-oriented ablation studies that test which components, assumptions, or design choices support a paper's claims.

name: analyze-results
title: Experiment Results Analysis
description: Use this skill to interpret machine learning experiment results, compare methods, summarize metrics, and produce evidence-aware tables or insights.

name: claims-drafting
title: Patent Claims Drafting
description: Use this skill to draft patent claims from an invention disclosure or technical idea.

name: codex-index-generator
title: Codex Skill Index Generator
description: Use this skill locally in Codex to update skills/index.json while preserving existing entries and generating metadata only for new skills.

name: deep-research
title: Deep Academic Research
description: Use this skill for thorough multi-source literature investigation, fact verification, PDF deep reading, and structured evidence audits.

name: embodiment-description
title: Patent Embodiment Description
description: Use this skill to write detailed embodiments that explain how to practice an invention in a patent specification.

name: experiment-audit
title: Experiment Integrity Audit
description: Use this skill to audit whether experiments honestly support claimed results and to detect missing evidence, invalid comparisons, or result-reporting risks.

name: experiment-plan
title: Claim-Driven Experiment Plan
description: Use this skill to turn a research idea or refined method into a detailed experiment roadmap, evaluation protocol, ablation matrix, and compute-aware run plan.

name: figure-description
title: Patent Figure Description
description: Use this skill to turn patent figures or figure lists into formal drawing descriptions with reference numerals.

name: formula-derivation
title: Formula Derivation
description: Use this skill to structure assumptions, derive formulas, organize equations, and turn theory notes into a coherent research derivation.

name: idea-creator
title: Research Idea Creator
description: Use this skill to brainstorm, generate, and rank publishable research ideas within a broad direction.

name: invention-structuring
title: Invention Disclosure Structuring
description: Use this skill to structure a raw technical idea into a patent-ready invention disclosure.

name: mermaid-diagram
title: Mermaid Diagram Generator
description: Use this skill to generate Mermaid diagram code for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, ER diagrams, Gantt charts, and related diagrams.

name: novelty-check
title: Research Novelty Check
description: Use this skill to check whether a research idea or method appears novel against recent literature and known approaches.

name: paper-claim-audit
title: Paper Claim Audit
description: Use this skill to verify that a paper's numerical results, comparisons, and scope claims match the available evidence.

name: paper-figure
title: Web-Safe Paper Figure Planner
description: Use this skill to plan publication-quality paper figures, plots, tables, captions, and visualization specifications from experimental results.

name: paper-illustration
title: Web-Safe Paper Illustration Designer
description: Use this skill to design method diagrams, architecture figures, visual abstracts, and image-generation prompts for academic papers.

name: paper-plan
title: Paper Outline Planner
description: Use this skill to generate a structured paper outline from a topic, narrative, review conclusions, or experiment results.

name: paper-poster
title: Web-Safe Paper Poster Planner
description: Use this skill to convert a paper or research project into a conference poster layout, section text, figure placement plan, captions, and presenter pitch.

name: paper-slides
title: Web-Safe Paper Slides Planner
description: Use this skill to convert a paper, abstract, or research project into a conference-talk slide outline, speaker notes, and talk script.

name: paper-write
title: Paper Section Writer
description: Use this skill to draft LaTeX paper sections from a paper plan, outline, venue target, or section-level writing goal.

name: patent-review
title: Web-Safe Patent Review
description: Use this skill to simulate a patent examiner-style review of claims, specification, embodiments, figures, and prior-art risks.

name: quick-lit
title: Quick Literature Search
description: Use this skill for fast academic literature search, source tracing, related-work mapping, paper summaries, or material-property source lookup.

name: rebuttal
title: Review Rebuttal Writer
description: Use this skill to prepare grounded, venue-compliant rebuttal responses to external reviews.

name: research-lit
title: Research Literature Review
description: Use this skill to search, summarize, and analyze academic papers for related work or literature review tasks.

name: research-refine
title: Research Plan Refinement
description: Use this skill to turn a vague research direction into a concrete, problem-anchored, implementation-oriented method plan.

name: research-review
title: Web-Safe Research Review
description: Use this skill to critically review a research idea, paper draft, experiment plan, or results from the perspective of senior academic reviewers.

name: result-to-claim
title: Result-to-Claim Gate
description: Use this skill after experiments finish to judge what claims the results support, what remains unsupported, and what evidence is still needed.

name: specification-writing
title: Patent Specification Writing
description: Use this skill to write a full patent specification from claims, embodiments, and invention disclosure materials.

name: writing-systems-papers
title: Systems Paper Writing Blueprint
description: Use this skill for paragraph-level structure, page allocation, and writing patterns for systems papers targeting venues such as OSDI, SOSP, ASPLOS, NSDI, and EuroSys.
